title: UnDercontrol Board Resource
description: Schema for Kanban board YAML resource files. Boards organize tasks into columns with optional query filters and auto-actions.

board_type.description: private: shows all accessible tasks. shared: shows only tasks shared with the board's group.

columns.description: Ordered list of columns. Order in the array determines display order.

default_tags.description: Tags automatically applied to tasks created in this board.

project_id.description: Optional reference to a Project entity. When set, the project's cwd is used as a fallback if the board has no explicit projectDir in its metadata.

query.description: SQL-like filter query for tasks in this column (e.g., "status = 'todo'", "status = 'in-progress' AND tags CONTAINS 'urgent'"). Actions are auto-derived from the query at runtime.

example.description:
Example board YAML:

apiVersion: ud/v1
kind: Board
spec:
  name: Sprint Board
  board_type: private
  default_tags: [sprint-1]
  columns:
    - name: Backlog
      query: "status = 'todo'"
    - name: In Progress
      query: "status = 'in-progress'"
    - name: Review
      query: "status = 'pending'"
    - name: Done
      query: "status = 'done'"
